# Mr. Mosspuddle running a book shop

Priority: Low
Products: TWOLD (../Data/Products/TWOLD%20e028aa0786f5449984a4f497c1d746fa.md)

[Mr. Mosspuddle](../Data/Characters/Mr%20Mosspuddle%2027e58e628ba28079b3dbea177182d1f9.md) owning a [Book shop](../Data/Locations/Book%20shop%2027e58e628ba280c5a087c33570ca7e30.md).

I like how this idea is low maintenance.  I can use it as much or as little as works with the rest of the story.

It would be useful even it was just mentioned in passing in a single sentence.

<aside>
💡

It occurred to me while fleshing out [Adelle as a Barista](Adelle%20as%20a%20Barista%201d858e628ba280d9bac1cc43140ce0b9.md), if [Adelle](../Data/Characters/Adelle%202ff1980fd10b42a7bc0f65b61a2ab3e8.md) is working at a [Tea shop](../Data/Locations/Tea%20shop%2027e58e628ba2801795a5c6553b61bb15.md), maybe [Mr. Mosspuddle](../Data/Characters/Mr%20Mosspuddle%2027e58e628ba28079b3dbea177182d1f9.md) can have a book shop in the same city.

</aside>

<aside>
💡

With a printing press in a back room for the [Mr. Mosspuddle printing copies of Marloth](Mr%20Mosspuddle%20printing%20copies%20of%20Marloth%2027e58e628ba2804e9e94f98ab493a19a.md) idea.
